title: Oil surpasses $95 after Trump's threats against Iran and tensions in the Middle East
summary: Growing geopolitical tensions and US threats against Iran drive up oil and gas prices, fueling fears of an energy shock in Europe.

title: Alphabet beats expectations with record profit driven by cloud and defends its AI leadership
summary: Google's parent company reports an increase in quarterly profit thanks to growth in its cloud business, while its CEO rejects criticism of a supposed loss of ground in artificial intelligence.

title: Tesla falls on stock market after posting quarterly results that disappoint on earnings
summary: Tesla shares plunge after its earnings fell short of forecasts, despite an increase in revenue.

title: Wall Street closes virtually unchanged with slight declines
summary: The main US stock indices end the session with minimal movements, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq recording slight losses.

title: Private equity lags behind as IPO boom boosts Wall Street banks
summary: Private equity firms are not taking advantage of the rebound in initial public offerings and mergers, which mainly benefits large investment banks.

title: Tokyo threatens to take action as yen plunges to 163 yen per dollar
summary: The yen's weakness continues to pressure Japanese authorities, who warn of imminent intervention to stem the currency's fall.

title: Ibex 35 approaches 19,600 points boosted by corporate results
summary: The Spanish stock index continues its bullish rally, supported by strong company figures, while analysts highlight its strength.
